name: Himeko • Nova
desc: Some fight side by side, some keep watch. The Trailblaze is never a lonely voyage.\nShe paints a trailblazing miracle. The silver rail stretches on, and the Nameless set sail once more, illuminating the galaxy's eternal night.\nAt the end of the line, she looks back once again. The dream of setting forth has never run aground.

1.name: That Which We Stride Is the Trailblaze
1.desc: The number of extra <u>Assist Skill</u> uses from Talent additionally increases by <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak>. While in the "Companion Protocol: Verdict" state, reduces the number of Ultimate uses required to launch <u>Assist Skill</u> by <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>. While in the "Companion Protocol: Decimation" state, reduces the Charge required to launch <u>Assist Skill</u> by <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. When Himeko • Nova launches <u>Assist Skill</u>, the number of extra DMG instances increases by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

2.name: The Colors We Never Strike
2.desc: The cap of Himeko • Nova's <u>Assist Skill</u> uses increases to 2, and the DMG dealt by Ultimate and <u>Assist Skill</u> becomes <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of their original DMG. During the "Navigator's Semaphore" state, at the start of each turn, additionally recovers 1 use of <u>Assist Skill</u> immediately. When a non-<u>Trailblaze Companions</u> character uses <u>Assist Skill</u>, the Trace "Hark! The Express's Pulse Roars" now also grants them 1 <u>extra turn</u>.

10000031.name: Trailblaze Companions
10000031.desc: Trailblazer, Himeko, Himeko • Nova, March 7th, Evernight, Dan Heng, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Welt, Sunday.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

3.name: We Who Are Starborn Muse Starward
3.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Let No Skyward Hand Stay Unheld
4.desc: When using <u>Assist Skill</u> via the Talent "Of Fire and Far Faring," the All-Type RES PEN boost now applies to all allies. And when Himeko • Nova gains this effect, her All-Type RES PEN additionally increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

5.name: To Cross the Cosmos and Beyond
5.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Ours Is the Oath to Sail Starward
6.desc: Himeko • Nova's Fire <u>RES PEN</u> increases by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. The cap of <u>"Source Energy"</u> increases to <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>. When an ally uses or launches <u>Assist Skill</u>, DMG dealt by <u>Assist Skill</u> increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>, and Himeko • Nova gains 1 <u>"Source Energy."</u> When launching "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" during Ultimate, additionally gains 1 <u>"Source Energy"</u>. When launching "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," if the current <u>"Source Energy"</u> is <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> or more, additionally deals 1 instance of Fire DMG to all enemies, equal to <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak> of Himeko • Nova's ATK.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

151001.name: Enkindle the First Lodestar
151001.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one enemy.
151001.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

151002.name: Upraise the Vanward Cresset
151002.desc: After using Skill, immediately recovers all <u>Assist Skill</u> uses. Himeko • Nova gains "Navigator's Semaphore," lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This duration decreases by 1 at the start of Himeko • Nova's every turn. When Himeko • Nova has "Navigator's Semaphore," DMG dealt by all allies increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>. At the start of every turn, immediately recovers 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> use.
151002.simple_desc: After using Skill, immediately recovers all <u>Assist Skill</u> uses. Himeko • Nova gains "Navigator's Semaphore." When Himeko • Nova has "Navigator's Semaphore," DMG dealt increases. At the start of every turn, immediately regains 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> use.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

151003.name: We, Too, Stride the Stars
151003.desc: Immediately takes control of "Starblazer." "Starblazer" can launch "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" against enemies 6 times, or consume <u>"Source Energy"</u> to launch "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," dealing Fire DMG up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one designated enemy, and Fire DMG up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to other targets.\nWhen the uses of "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" are depleted, automatically launches "Orbital Annihilation Pulse," followed by Final Hit, dealing <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> instance(s) of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.\nWhen "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" or "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" deals fatal damage to all enemies on the field, or when enemy HP can no longer be reduced, immediately launches Final Hit.
151003.simple_desc: During the Ultimate, can launch "Hyperluminal Particle Beam" or "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" on all enemies. At the end, deals Fire DMG to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> random single enemies.

151004.name: Of Fire and Far Faring
151004.desc: While Himeko • Nova is on the field, immediately deploys the <u>Territory</u> "Starblazer Visioscape," summoning "Starblazer" to the field and granting all ally characters 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> use. Ally characters can use <u>Assist Skill</u> to call upon "Starblazer" to attack enemies.\nUsing <u>Assist Skill</u> is considered as Himeko • Nova using her Skill. Himeko • Nova gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> increased All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> and <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> increased CRIT DMG. When attacking, can ignore Weakness Types to reduce enemy Toughness. When breaking Weakness, triggers the Fire Weakness Break effect.\nWhen ally characters other than Himeko • Nova use their <u>Assist Skill</u>, regenerates <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Energy for them.
151004.simple_desc: When Himeko • Nova is on the field, deploys a <u>Territory</u>, granting all ally characters <u>Assist Skill</u>. When an ally character uses <u>Assist Skill</u>, Himeko • Nova gains increased All-Type <u>RES PEN</u> and increased CRIT DMG. When attacking, ignores Weakness Types to reduce Toughness.\nWhen ally characters other than Himeko • Nova use <u>Assist Skill</u>, regenerates Energy for them.

10000020.name: Territory
10000020.desc: Territory effects are unique in the battle. While it exists, other abilities with Territory effects cannot be used.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

30000005.name: RES PEN
30000005.desc: When dealing DMG, ignore a part of the enemy target's resistance to the corresponding damage type.

151006.name: Attack
151006.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

151007.name: Starcharter Cruise
151007.desc: When Himeko • Nova is in the team, increases the max Technique Points by 3.\nAfter using Technique, enters the "Cruise" state for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> seconds. Actively using the Technique consumes 2 Technique Points and immediately attacks all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, immediately uses Skill 1 time at the start of each wave.\nIf attacking a Normal Enemy, immediately defeats them without entering combat. No Technique Points are consumed if no enemies are hit.
151007.simple_desc: Increases the <color=#f29e38ff>max Technique Points</color> by 3. After actively using Technique, enters the "Cruise" state and consumes 2 Technique Points to attack all enemies within a certain range. After entering combat, uses Skill 1 time at the start of each wave.\nIf attacking a Normal Enemy, <color=#f29e38ff>immediately defeats them</color> without entering combat. No Technique Points are consumed if no enemies are hit.

151008.name: Hyperluminal Particle Beam
151008.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies and gains <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of <u>"Source Energy."</u> A maximum of <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> <u>"Source Energy"</u> can be held.
151008.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies. Gains <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> point(s) of <u>"Source Energy."</u> A maximum of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak></color> <u>"Source Energy"</u> can be held.

151009.name: Orbital Annihilation Pulse
151009.desc: Consumes 1 point of <u>"Source Energy"</u> to deal Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies. When the current <u>"Source Energy"</u> is more than 1, for every <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> point(s) of <u>"Source Energy"</u> consumed, additionally deals 1 instance of Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.
151009.simple_desc: Consumes 1 point of <u>"Source Energy"</u> to deal minor Fire DMG to all enemies. When the current <u>"Source Energy"</u> is more than 1, for every <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> <u>"Source Energy"</u> consumed, deals 1 instance of minor Fire DMG to one random enemy.

151014.name: We, Too, Stride the Stars
151014.simple_desc: Deals <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> instance(s) of DMG, each dealing Fire DMG to one random enemy.

151022.name: Trailblaze, By Your Side
151022.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy. When used by Himeko • Nova, deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to all enemies, and additionally deals <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> instances of DMG, with each instance dealing Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak></color> of Himeko • Nova's ATK to one random enemy.\nIf the user is a <u>Trailblaze Companions</u> character other than Himeko • Nova, then depending on the user, Himeko • Nova additionally gains 1 of the <color=#DE7A66><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarHimekoNova id=0 width=1 height=1>Special</unbreak> Effects</u></color>.\nThe extra <u>Assist Skill</u> via all <color=#DE7A66><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarHimekoNova id=1 width=1 height=1>Special</unbreak> Effects</u></color> can be launched up to <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> time(s) per battle, and this count is reset after Himeko • Nova uses her Ultimate.
151022.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies, and minor Fire DMG to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak></color> random enemies. When used by Himeko • Nova, deals minor Fire DMG to all enemies, and minor Fire DMG to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak></color> random enemies. If used by a <u>Trailblaze Companions</u> character other than Himeko • Nova, she will gain 1 of the <color=#DE7A66><u><unbreak><icon SpriteName=AvatarHimekoNova id=0 width=1 height=1>Special</unbreak> Effects</u></color>.

10000031.name: Trailblaze Companions
10000031.desc: Trailblazer, Himeko, Himeko • Nova, March 7th, Evernight, Dan Heng, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Welt, Sunday.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

151025.name: Companion Protocol: Verdict
151025.desc: Enters the "Companion Protocol: Verdict" state. Increases DMG dealt by Himeko • Nova by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>, and additionally increases her Ultimate DMG dealt by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color>. After Himeko • Nova's teammates actively use their Ultimate <unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak> time(s), Himeko • Nova immediately launches 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> against enemies at no cost.
151025.simple_desc: Enters the "Companion Protocol: Verdict" state. Increases DMG dealt by Himeko • Nova, and additionally increases her Ultimate DMG dealt. After Himeko • Nova's teammates actively use their Ultimate <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak></color> time(s), Himeko • Nova immediately launches 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> against enemies.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

151026.name: Companion Protocol: Decimation
151026.desc: Enters the "Companion Protocol: Decimation" state. Increases all allies' CRIT DMG by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]%</unbreak></color>, and additionally increases the CRIT DMG dealt by Skill by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]%</unbreak></color>. For every 1 enemy target hit by allies, gains 1 Charge. When Charge reaches <unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak>, consumes all Charge, and Himeko • Nova immediately launches 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> against enemies at no cost. This instance of <u>Assist Skill</u> cannot grant Charge.
151026.simple_desc: Enters the "Companion Protocol: Decimation" state. Increases all allies' CRIT DMG, and additionally increases CRIT DMG dealt by Skill. For every 1 enemy target hit by allies, gains 1 Charge. When Charge reaches <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]</unbreak></color>, consumes all Charge, and Himeko • Nova immediately launches 1 <u>Assist Skill</u> against enemies.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

1.point_name: Whither, the Last and First Men?
1.point_desc: When Himeko • Nova launches <u>Assist Skill</u>, it does not consume <u>Assist Skill</u> uses. At the start of the turn, if the <u>Assist Skill</u> uses have reached the current cap, Himeko • Nova additionally regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

1.point_desc: When a <u>Trailblaze Companions</u> character other than Himeko • Nova uses <u>Assist Skill</u>, that character immediately gains 1 <u>extra turn</u> in which they can insert the use of their Ultimate. The <u>extra turn</u> gained from <u>Assist Skill</u> will not repeatedly trigger this Trace effect.

10000000.name: Extra Turn
10000000.desc: Gain 1 extra turn that won't expend your remaining turns when taking action. During this extra turn, no Ultimate can be used.

10000031.name: Trailblaze Companions
10000031.desc: Trailblazer, Himeko, Himeko • Nova, March 7th, Evernight, Dan Heng, Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae, Dan Heng • Permansor Terrae, Welt, Sunday.

10000032.name: Assist Skill
10000032.desc: An extra ability that can be granted to an ally target. Using an Assist Skill will also consume the current action turn.

1.point_name: The Silver Rail, Hushed in Antiquity
1.point_desc: When using Ultimate, immediately gains <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> <u>"Source Energy."</u> If the current <u>"Source Energy"</u> is <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> or more, when using the "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" attack, the DMG multiplier of "Orbital Annihilation Pulse" against random single enemies increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>.
